footer.description: Ibbil is a specialized platform providing comprehensive camel services in Saudi Arabia, including insurance, transport, permits, fodder, and veterinary care.

home.seoTitle: Ibbil Platform | Camel Services in Saudi Arabia
home.seoDescription: A specialized platform for camel services: insurance, transport, permits, veterinary care and stores.
home.heroTitle: Everything you need for the camel world in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Browse stores, manage permits, and request insurance, transport, and veterinary services with ease and security.
home.servicesSubtitle: Choose the service you need and get started instantly on Ibbil.

serviceItems.stores: Shop fodder, supplies, and camel products from trusted stores.
serviceItems.insurance: Clear insurance policies to protect your camels with confidence.
serviceItems.transport: Reliable transport services across cities and regions.
serviceItems.veterinary: Veterinary care and health follow-up from specialists.
serviceItems.permits: Issue and manage permits with simple, clear steps.
serviceItems.media: News and coverage from the camel world and the platform.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Ibbil is the first platform to offer a complete commercial marketplace for all camel-related services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
about.body: It covers insurance, transport, and permits, as well as fodder and food stores, camel supplies, and veterinary services — in addition to camel trading, leasing, and sharing. Shop across many stores and benefit from services offered by merchants, veterinarians, and store owners on the Ibbil platform.
about.imageAlt: A camel in a desert setting representing the Ibbil platform
